queue.title: Implement IDA* with ZeroHeuristic
queue.prompt: Implement IDA* using the existing SearchSolution and Heuristic abstractions. Start with ZeroHeuristic support and keep the implementation bounded by max_depth. Use only FACE_MOVES for search expansion.
acceptance: solved cube returns an empty solution
1-move and 2-move scrambles solve within depth limit
insufficient max_depth returns None
explored_nodes is reported
the returned solution actually solves the cube
verification: if [ -f "$HOME/.cargo/env" ]; then . "$HOME/.cargo/env"; fi; cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
queue.commitMessage: Implement IDA* search with zero heuristic

queue.title: Wire IDA* to simple heuristics
queue.prompt: Use the existing simple heuristics with IDA*. Add tests showing MaxHeuristic can guide IDA* on shallow scrambles without changing correctness. Keep ZeroHeuristic behavior intact.

MaxHeuristic solves shallow scrambles

all solutions remain valid and use FACE_MOVES
